news.title:
Apollo Pipe, Aster DM, NLC India show bullish breakouts with clear buy levels, targets, and stop-loss points.
Apollo Pipe targets ₹470, Aster DM ₹730, and NLC India ₹292, supported by strong technical setups and buyer interest.
news.summary:
Apollo Pipe, Aster DM, NLC India show bullish breakouts with clear buy levels, targets, and stop-loss points.
Apollo Pipe targets ₹470, Aster DM ₹730, and NLC India ₹292, supported by strong technical setups and buyer interest.

news.title: Aster DM Healthcare declares an interim dividend of Rs 3/share.
news.summary: Aster DM Healthcare declares an interim dividend of Rs 3/share.

news.title:
Aster DM Healthcare received a GST order alleging nonpayment of GST on insurance fees.
The tax and penalty demand is Rs. 72.9M; company plans to appeal, citing no material financial impact.
news.summary:
Aster DM Healthcare received a GST order alleging nonpayment of GST on insurance fees.
The tax and penalty demand is Rs. 72.9M; company plans to appeal, citing no material financial impact.

news.title:
Aster DM Healthcare's board to meet on March 26, 2026, to consider FY 2025-26 interim dividend.
Record date for interim dividend, if declared, is April 3, 2026; trading window closed till results.
news.summary:
Aster DM Healthcare's board to meet on March 26, 2026, to consider FY 2025-26 interim dividend.
Record date for interim dividend, if declared, is April 3, 2026; trading window closed till results.

news.title:
Kotak reinstates Add on Aster DM Healthcare with TP ₹725, citing 19%/22% sales/EBITDA CAGR post Quality Care merger.
Growth driven by synergies, oncology, better payor mix, lower ALOS, and 4,342-bed expansion (~60% brownfield).
news.summary:
Kotak reinstates Add on Aster DM Healthcare with TP ₹725, citing 19%/22% sales/EBITDA CAGR post Quality Care merger.
Growth driven by synergies, oncology, better payor mix, lower ALOS, and 4,342-bed expansion (~60% brownfield).

news.title:
Aster DM Healthcare executed NSE block trade for 889,434 shares at Rs. 643.25.
The trade totaled Rs. 57.2 crores in value, reflecting significant activity.
news.summary:
Aster DM Healthcare executed NSE block trade for 889,434 shares at Rs. 643.25.
The trade totaled Rs. 57.2 crores in value, reflecting significant activity.

news.title:
Aster DM Healthcare faces disruptions due to nurse strike in Kerala hospitals, impacting operations and occupancy.
Kerala HC orders strike deferment; company reports INR 17.7cr loss but expects resolution by March 19, 2026.
news.summary:
Aster DM Healthcare faces disruptions due to nurse strike in Kerala hospitals, impacting operations and occupancy.
Kerala HC orders strike deferment; company reports INR 17.7cr loss but expects resolution by March 19, 2026.

news.title:
Aster DM Healthcare plans to add 4,000 beds and invest ₹4K cr in 2 years.
Merger with Blackstone-backed QCIL likely finalized next quarter, says Dy MD Alisha Moopen.
news.summary:
Aster DM Healthcare plans to add 4,000 beds and invest ₹4K cr in 2 years.
Merger with Blackstone-backed QCIL likely finalized next quarter, says Dy MD Alisha Moopen.

news.title:
Aster DM shareholders approve merger with QCIL; combined entity to have 10,625 beds in 28 cities.
Merger creates one of India’s top 3 hospital chains; expected next quarter post final approvals.
news.summary:
Aster DM shareholders approve merger with QCIL; combined entity to have 10,625 beds in 28 cities.
Merger creates one of India’s top 3 hospital chains; expected next quarter post final approvals.

news.title:
Aster DM Healthcare plans merger with Quality Care India Ltd to form top 3 hospital chain.
Merger includes 99.998% shareholder approval and FY24 EBITDA synergy upside of 10-15%.
news.summary:
Aster DM Healthcare plans merger with Quality Care India Ltd to form top 3 hospital chain.
Merger includes 99.998% shareholder approval and FY24 EBITDA synergy upside of 10-15%.

news.title:
Aster DM Healthcare's unit plans to raise funds from investors.
Funds aim to support operational and expansion strategies.
news.summary:
Aster DM Healthcare's unit plans to raise funds from investors.
Funds aim to support operational and expansion strategies.

news.title:
HDFC MF raises stake in Aster DM Healthcare to 7% after acquiring 2.2%. Aster DM reported Q3 net profit of ₹524.5M.
HDFC Flexi Cap Fund crosses ₹1 lakh crore AUM, reflecting disciplined investment and 3-decade market track record.
news.summary:
HDFC MF raises stake in Aster DM Healthcare to 7% after acquiring 2.2%. Aster DM reported Q3 net profit of ₹524.5M.
HDFC Flexi Cap Fund crosses ₹1 lakh crore AUM, reflecting disciplined investment and 3-decade market track record.

news.title:
Aster DM Healthcare Ltd reported Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 15% YoY to INR 2,366 crore, driven by a 9% rise in patient volumes and 8% improvement in Inpatient ARPP.
Operating EBITDA grew 22% YoY to INR 503 crore, achieving a margin of 21%, with Kerala cluster delivering strong 20% revenue growth and 25.4% EBITDA margin excluding new Kasargod hospital.
news.summary:
Aster DM Healthcare Ltd reported Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 15% YoY to INR 2,366 crore, driven by a 9% rise in patient volumes and 8% improvement in Inpatient ARPP.
Operating EBITDA grew 22% YoY to INR 503 crore, achieving a margin of 21%, with Kerala cluster delivering strong 20% revenue growth and 25.4% EBITDA margin excluding new Kasargod hospital.

news.title:
Aster DM Healthcare to merge with Blackstone-backed Quality Care India Ltd.
Combined entity to have 10,625 beds, INR 8,105 Cr revenue FY25; EPS accretive.
news.summary:
Aster DM Healthcare to merge with Blackstone-backed Quality Care India Ltd.
Combined entity to have 10,625 beds, INR 8,105 Cr revenue FY25; EPS accretive.

news.title: Aster DM Healthcare reports 15% revenue growth and targets 14,710 beds by FY27.
news.summary: Aster DM Healthcare reports 15% revenue growth and targets 14,710 beds by FY27.

news.title:
Aster DM Healthcare held its Q3 FY25 earnings call on Jan 2, 2026.
The video/audio recording of the call is available on the company's website.
news.summary:
Aster DM Healthcare held its Q3 FY25 earnings call on Jan 2, 2026.
The video/audio recording of the call is available on the company's website.

news.title:
Aster DM Healthcare announced the resignation of Mr. Prajwal Jaigopal, Legal Manager, effective January 31, 2026.
The resignation was due to personal commitments, with no material reasons linked to the company.
news.summary:
Aster DM Healthcare announced the resignation of Mr. Prajwal Jaigopal, Legal Manager, effective January 31, 2026.
The resignation was due to personal commitments, with no material reasons linked to the company.

news.title:
Aster DM Healthcare's Q3 net profit fell to 525M INR from 568M INR YoY.
Q3 revenue rose to 11.85B INR, up from 10.5B INR in the previous year.
news.summary:
Aster DM Healthcare's Q3 net profit fell to 525M INR from 568M INR YoY.
Q3 revenue rose to 11.85B INR, up from 10.5B INR in the previous year.

news.title:
Aster DM Healthcare's board approved Q3 & 9M FY26 results with Deloitte's unmodified report.
Key updates: ESOP Scheme 2026 approval, loan-to-equity conversion, 5.02% subsidiary stake acquisition.
news.summary:
Aster DM Healthcare's board approved Q3 & 9M FY26 results with Deloitte's unmodified report.
Key updates: ESOP Scheme 2026 approval, loan-to-equity conversion, 5.02% subsidiary stake acquisition.

news.title:
Aster DM Healthcare acquires 5.02% stake in Prerana Hospital for INR 18.6 crores.
This raises Aster DM's ownership in Prerana Hospital from 93.9% to 98.9%.
news.summary:
Aster DM Healthcare acquires 5.02% stake in Prerana Hospital for INR 18.6 crores.
This raises Aster DM's ownership in Prerana Hospital from 93.9% to 98.9%.
